creator: kbowling@freebsd.org
text:
I think that change needs to set JAVA_VERSION to 1.8 so everything is aligned?

Seeing the following when using 
org.apache.hadoop.hbase.DoNotRetryIOException: Compression algorithm 'lz4' previously failed test.

HBase and Hadoop2 are https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=413507 version
